title: Cx43 enhances response to BRAF/MEK inhibitors by reducing DNA repair capacity
author: Varela-Vázquez, Adrián
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Nat comm: Data availabilityProteomic data generated in this study are available via Proteo-meXchange with the identifier PXD053555. RNA sequencing data havebeen uploaded to the NCBI Sequence Read Archive (SRA) with theidentifier PRJNA1225446. The data that support the findings of thisstudy are available from the corresponding author uponrequest. Source data are provided with this paper.
